results.rendered_html: pattra—bhaṅga, m. ( Kād. ), pattra—bhaṅgi ( Dharmaśarm. ) and pattra—bhaṅgī ( Naiṣ. ), f. a decoration consisting in lines or streaks drawn on the face and body with musk and other fragrant substances.

results.rendered_html:
pattrabhaṅga (pa˚ + bha˚) m. mit Moschus und andern wohlriechenden Stoffen auf das Gesicht aufgetragene Striche und Zeichen  H. 655 , v. l. kastūrīvarapattrabhaṅganikaro bhraṣṭo na gaṇḍasthale  Spr. 622 . ˚bhaṅgi f. dass.  H. 655 . ˚bhaṅgī  ŚABDAR. _im_ ŚKDR. 
— Vgl. pattramañjarī, ˚latā, ˚lekhā, ˚vallarī, ˚valli, pattrāṅguli.
